message:
feat(tests): add 88 new tests for trace event module (bd-1kv3k)

Cover all 20+ constructors, all Display branches (every TraceData variant
including edge cases like empty/non-empty Futurelock held lists, chaos
with/without task, region with/without parent), TraceEventKind ordering
consistency, equality/clone semantics, logical time builder, and edge
cases (seq 0/MAX, negative IO bytes, zero-count checkpoints).

Coverage: 3 → 91 tests for src/trace/event.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
